azure_services.name: Azure API Management
azure_services.role: Managed API gateway, throttling, and policy enforcement

mappings.rationale: API Management provides gateway, rate limiting, transformation, and a developer portal as a managed service.

azure_services.name: Azure Service Bus
azure_services.role: Durable queues and topics for async messaging

mappings.rationale: Service Bus provides ordered, transactional, dead-letter-capable messaging suited to commands and events.
Managed Redis offloads read pressure and holds ephemeral shared state with sub-millisecond latency.

azure_services.name: Azure API Management
azure_services.role: Gateway-level circuit breaker and retry policies

mappings.rationale: Resilience is primarily a code concern (Polly), but API Management enforces gateway-level breaker policies.
AKS runs containerized microservices with autoscaling, rolling updates, and a broad ecosystem.
alternatives: Azure Container Apps (serverless containers, less control)

mappings.rationale: Entra ID issues and validates tokens for users and workloads and integrates with managed identities.
Azure Monitor + Application Insights provide metrics, logs, traces, and alerting integrated across Azure.
Durable Functions models compensating saga steps as orchestrations with built-in state and retry.

mapping_findings.description: no secrets-management pattern is present; secrets are likely handled ad hoc
mapping_findings.recommendation: Add the secrets_management pattern (Azure Key Vault) so credentials and certificates are off the code path.

mapping_findings.description: 3 pattern(s) are not in the curated Azure catalog and were not mapped
mapping_findings.recommendation: Verify the pattern name, or map it manually and propose a catalog addition with a verified Azure service.

mapping_rating: Pattern coverage is sound; close targeted gaps
summary: Pattern-to-Azure mapping for ecommerce-order-platform: 8/14 patterns mapped, 2 findings, mapping score 81/100.
